name: frUpdatePDU
title: frUpdatePDU
syntax: void frUpdatePDU(<PDU var>, dword flags, int updateCounter);
description: This function updates the PDU payload in the assigned FlexRay frames.
The update bit can also be set.

parameters.name: <PDU var>
parameters.description: Name of the variable referenced by the PDU object. The variable name was defined via frPDU when the object was created.

parameters.name: 0x01
parameters.description: Update bit is set on transmission.

parameters.name: All other bits are reserved and must be set to a value of 0.

parameters.description: The PDU is transmitted in every configured slot.
The PDU's default value is transmitted.

parameters.name: N (>0)
parameters.description: The PDU is transmitted at least n times.

description: The following example assumes that the database defines a PDU that is named PDU_CNT_02 and that this PDU contains a signal that is named counter.
This program sends the PDU once every 64 cycles. The update is made on the beginning of cycle 0.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
